caps.proposition_text: The clinician observes no bony tenderness on palpation of the foot.

evidence.span_text: MSK: Examination of the right ankle: Ecchymosis is present. There is swelling over the lateral malleolus. Tenderness to palpation anterolaterally in the soft tissue. No laxity on anterior drawer and inversion stress. No bony tenderness on palpation of the foot. Neurovascular intact. Capillary refill is less than 3 seconds with a strong dorsalis pedis pulse. Sensation is intact to light touch.

caps.proposition_text: 3 views of the right ankle reveal no evidence of fracture.

evidence.span_text: 3 views of the right ankle were taken today. These reveal no evidence of fracture.
